title: ETF universe expansion
hypothesis: Liquid sector/defensive ETF proxies may add rotation alpha that the current stock-heavy universe misses.
decision: Do not promote. Energy-only was the best variant but improved only late_strong and regressed mid_weak/old_thin.
next_retry_requires: A state discriminator for when Energy/USO continuation deserves slot competition.
Sector mapping and production watchlist parity before any ETF promotion.
Do not retry broad ETF universe additions as a simple candidate-pool expansion.
